steps.title: Find the sentence subject
steps.content: "The sculpture" is the singular subject of the blank. The sentence describes the sculpture's present location in Chicago, so the verb should be singular simple present.

steps.title: Apply subject agreement
steps.content: A and D use plural auxiliaries, and B uses plural "have" with a singular subject. The singular present-tense verb agrees with "the sculpture" and fits a permanent location. The answer is C.
